command.note: Runs Ontoly through its built package APIs with write:false so source repositories are not modified.
Structural fallback: full Graphify extraction required an LLM backend for docs/images, so this run analyzes a validation-side code projection only. Source repositories remain untouched.
Uses graphify extract with --out to avoid writing into the source repository. --no-cluster keeps the run headless and deterministic for release validation.
